debug_info.goal:
case pos
ι : Type u_1
𝕜 : Type u_2
V : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : DecidableEq ι
inst✝⁴ : Field 𝕜
inst✝³ : LinearOrder 𝕜
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing 𝕜
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝ : Module 𝕜 V
s : Finset ι
x y : ι → V
hy : ∀ i ∈ s, y i ∈ (convexHull 𝕜) (x '' (↑s \ {i}))
hs : s.Nontrivial
z : V
c : ι → 𝕜
hc₀ : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 ≤ c i
hc₁ : ∀ i ∈ s, c i ≤ 1
hz : ∀ i ∈ s, (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = z
hc : ∀ i ∈ s, c i = 1
i : ι
hi : i ∈ s
⊢ (↑(s \ {i}).card)⁻¹ • ∑ x_1 ∈ s \ {i}, x x_1 = y i

failed_attempts: simpa [hc i hi] using hz i hi

exact hxz j hj
        · intro hv
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := (hs.sdiff_singleton_nonempty i).coe_nonempty
          exact ⟨j, hj, (this j hj).trans hv.symm⟩
      rw [himg, convexHull_singleton] at hyi
      exact hyi.symm

exact hxz j hj
        · rintro rfl
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hs.exists_ne i
          exact ⟨j, ⟨hj.1, hj.2⟩, hxz j hj.1⟩
      rw [himg, convexHull_singleton] at this
      exact this.symm

· exact hxz i hi
      · exact Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr (card_ne_zero.mpr hsne)

exact hxz j hjs
        · rintro rfl
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hs.exists_ne i
          exact ⟨j, ⟨hj.1, hj.2⟩, hxz j hj.1⟩
      rw [himg, convexHull_singleton, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hyi
      exact hyi

exact hxz j hjs
        · rintro rfl
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hs.exists_ne i
          exact ⟨j, ⟨hj.1, hj.2⟩, hxz j hj.1⟩
      rw [this, convexHull_singleton, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hyi
      exact hyi.symm

have : y i ∈ ({z} : Set V) := by
        refine convexHull_min ?_ (convex_singleton z) (hy i hi)
        intro v hv
        obtain ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩ := hv
        exact Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr (hxz j (mem_of_mem_sdiff hj))
      exact Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp this
